votes.rationale: Adds manifest-gated bulk instantiation for panels per motion (instantiate --all/--panels/--only/--exclude/--dry-run) while preserving idempotency and existing scaffold semantics.
Safely requires the motion folder to exist and only scaffolds panels registered in .nexus/agent-panels.yaml; dry-run reduces blast radius and makes outcomes predictable.
Unanimous consent satisfied; proceed to ratify. This is the correct scaling mechanism without relaxing governance boundaries.
